violations.text: Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The ceiling of the walk-in freezer in the basement area is in poor repair (observed heavily rusted and chipping) . The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024
Dead pests (cockroach) was observed under the register area at time of inspection. Staff removed pests immediately. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The ceiling of the walk-in freezer in the basement area is in poor repair (observed heavily rusted and chipping). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2024

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by live and dead activity observed in the food prep area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with debris: 1) All equipment and tables in the prep line had food and grease build up 2) Equipment in the cookline had food build up 3) Equipment and tables in the back prep area had food build up 4) Storage shelves throughout the establishment had food and soil residue 5) Area under register observed with old rodent droppings Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

The floors throughout the establishment have an accumulation of pooling water, soil and grease residue, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
The floors throughout the kitchen and ware-washing areas were observed in poor repair (grout missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The ceiling of the walk-in freezer in the basement was observed in poor repair (heavily rusted and peeling). New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The door to the outside, located in the basement is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2023

Walk in cooler located in the basement area was not in good repair(condensation dripping).Pans are are being used to protect food product. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation debris: 1.storage racks in walk in coolers observed with food debris and soil residue 2.gaskets in the 4 door refrigerator has an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. 3.shelves throughout the kitchen observed with food debris and soil residue. Physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
The vents in ceiling(AC)in kitchen area is in poor repair(dripping condensate onto floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink and sanitizer buckets was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023

The presence of flies and ants is not controlled as evidenced by live activity of both. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
Observed water accumulation in pans cleaned and sanitized that are not stored inverted.PIC removed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package the basement storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1.the knob on hand sink was missing. 2.the walk in freezer had duct tape and ice buildup on the external condenser hose. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation debris: 1.storage racks in walk in coolers observed with food debris and soil residue 2.gaskets in the 4 door refrigerator has an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. 3.shelves throughout the kitchen observed with food debris and soil residue. Physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the service sink area. Inspector observed that this faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device for water that is under continuous pressure. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Inspector informed the PIC. The PIC will inform management in order that the proper backflow prevention is installed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The following physical facilities was observed in poor repair: 1.floors in basement were cracked and missing tiles. 2.floors in the kitchen was missing grout and observed an accumulation of water. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The walk-in cooler fans, ceiling and vents in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023
